commands.review_summary:
The PR adds top-level `crabbox pause` and `crabbox resume` commands, a new optional `PausableBackend` interface, Islo pause/resume SDK calls, tests, and command/provider docs.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a new feature PR rather than a broken existing behavior report. The functional path is source-reviewable in the PR diff and backed by the contributor's live Islo output.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Human review is the right lane because the remaining blocker is maintainer acceptance of a new core provider capability/API, not a narrow code-only repair.

target.title: feat: pause/resume commands via optional PausableBackend (islo first)
target.body:
## What

Adds a generic, opt-in **pause/resume** capability to crabbox and implements it for the **islo** provider, which natively supports snapshot-to-disk pause + resume.

## Design (right altitude, not a one-off)

Mirrors crabbox's existing optional-interface pattern (`DoctorBackend`, `CleanupBackend`):

- **`PausableBackend`** interface (`Backend` + `Pause`/`Resume`) plus `PauseRequest`/`ResumeRequest` in `internal/cli/provider_backend.go`.
- **`crabbox pause` / `crabbox resume`** commands that reuse `stop`'s flag parsing and provider resolution, then dispatch via a type assertion. Providers that don't implement the interface return a clear `provider=<name> does not support pause` ŌĆö no behavior change for anyone else.
- A compile-time assertion (`var _ core.PausableBackend = (*isloBackend)(nil)`) guards signature drift.

## islo implementation

`Pause`/`Resume` call the Islo SDK's `PauseSandbox`/`ResumeSandbox` (which return a decoded `SandboxResponse`), resolve the lease like `stop`, and **keep the lease claim across a pause** so it can be resumed.

## Tests

`TestIsloPauseResumeCallProvider` (backend dispatches to the provider with the resolved sandbox name; non-Crabbox ids rejected). `go build ./...`, `go vet`, `gofmt`, and the full `internal/cli` + `internal/providers/islo` suites pass.

## Verified live (api.islo.dev)

```
warmup ŌåÆ status: state=running ready=true
pause  ŌåÆ paused lease=ŌĆ”        ŌåÆ status: state=paused  ready=false
resume ŌåÆ resumed lease=ŌĆ”       ŌåÆ status: state=running ready=true
```

­¤ż¢ Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
